papers.title: Knowledge Distillation for Model Compression
papers.abstract: This paper presents advances in machine learning methodology with broad applicability. papers.title: Diffusion Models for High-Resolution Image Synthesis
papers.abstract: We introduce a new method for computer vision tasks that leverages the power of modern neural architectures. Our approach achieves superior performance on visual recognition benchmarks while being computationally efficient. We demonstrate the generalizability of our method across diverse visual domains and downstream tasks.
